fixture.description: A module is deleted while an unchanged consumer still imports from it — the deletion breaks the importer (semantic adjacency).

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that deleting src/legacy.ts breaks the unchanged consumer src/main.ts, which still imports legacyHelper from './legacy' (a now-missing module/export), at IMPORTANT or CRITICAL severity. FAIL if the broken import caused by the deletion is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Review detects the deletion breaks src/main.ts's import of legacyHelper
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT ignore the deleted file just because the importer is unchanged
